author: crispypata
title: This is a test Blog
content:
I have created a script that should be able to read the contents of this html to be converted to json file.

I am chaking the capabilities of the read write methods of Node.js to ensure that there are no discrepancies occurring in the article.

It seems that it is possible to embed Paragraph tags in this raw format and to be converted to json form with the power of Node.js.
